root_causes: Class imbalance — Normal:Attack ratio = 6.97:1, model biased toward Normal class
Underfitting — train_loss=0.3551 still above 0.3, model has not converged
Attack class collapse — recall=0.1209, model misses 88% of attacks
Insufficient training — loss still decreasing at final epoch, EarlyStopping not triggered
recommended_actions: Apply class weighting: class_weight={0: 1.0, 1: 7.0} in model.fit()
Consider SMOTE or random oversampling of attack class
Consider higher initial learning rate (Phase A: 0.003)
Lower classification threshold from 0.5 to 0.3 to increase attack recall at cost of precision
Use focal loss instead of binary_crossentropy to down-weight easy Normal examples
Verify Phase 1 data quality — check for label noise, feature scaling, or data leakage
